TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-03-2005 IN DEPT. 602, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO COMPLY WITH ORDERS OF THE COURT AT TRIAL GRANTED. THE AMENDED JUDGMENT IS TO INDICATED THAT BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE TO VACATE THE PREMISES AT 865 FELL ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA, BUT THAT ONLY DEFENDANT JEANNETTE HASSBERG IS TO BE LIABLE FOR THE RENT AND DAMAGES AND THAT THE AMOUNT OF MONETARY DAMAGES IS NOT TO EXCEED $25,000.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARAKIN, WALTER A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASSBERG, JEANETTE HASSBERG, AMELIA JOY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 865 FELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94117 $28,550.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,550.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF IS TO RECOVER RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 865 FELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94117 FROM BOTH DEFENDANTS, HOWEVER THE MONETARY DAMAGES ARE RECOVERABLE ONLY FROM DEFENDANT JEANNETTE HASSBERG AND ARE NOT TO EXCEED $25,000. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DFT. JEANNETTE HASSBERG: DFT. FAILED TO PAY $3550 BACK RENT PRIOR TO EXPIRATION OF 3 DAY NTC. TENENCY TERMINATED, LEASE FORFEITED, PLNTF GETS POSSESSION OF PREMISES. DAMAGES ARE $10050 1/31/00-12/31/00, $9125 1/1/01-12/31/01, $7300 1/1/02-12/31/02, $5475 1/1/03-12/31/03 & $3650 1/1/04-12/31/04, BUT ARE NOT TO EXCEED $25,000. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTIES. PLNTF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT.
